description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar, and bold graphic and flock print on chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash with warm water of 40 degreesWash inside out with like coloursDo not bleachDry in shadeDo not iron on printAdvertise your strengths, with the sun doing the talking, in this summery white t-shirt. The colour blending print with a contrast coloured velvet flock print makes this tee perfect for those who want to flaunt their cool attitude. A great casual wear option, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18"
